codedeploy.deploymentgroup.alarmconfigur.Docs: A list of alarms configured for the deployment group. A maximum of 10 alarms can be added to a deployment group.
Indicates whether the alarm configuration is enabled.

Indicates whether a deployment should continue if information about the current state of alarms cannot be retrieved from Amazon CloudWatch. The default value is `false`.  +  `true`: The deployment proceeds even if alarm status information can't be retrieved from CloudWatch.+  `false`: The deployment stops if alarm status information can't be retrieved from CloudWatch.
